executives.name: Anna Sudlow
executives.background: Ms Sudlow is a corporate finance professional with over 25 years’ experience across the energy and resources sectors. She has held senior finance roles with Woodside Energy and several ASX-listed mining companies. She is a Fellow of CPA Australia and a Graduate of the Australian Institute of Company Directors.

executives.name: Miriam Stanborough
executives.background: Miriam Stanborough is a chemical engineer with over 20 years of experience in the minerals processing industry. She has held roles at Monadelphous, Iluka Resources, and Alcoa.

executives.name: Peter Watson
executives.background: Mr Watson is a chemical engineer with over 40 years’ experience in the resources and engineering sectors. He has held senior executive and board positions with several ASX-listed companies, including Sedgman and GR Engineering Services. He has extensive experience in project development and operations.
